---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new command, MCP tool, or capability
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

A clear description of the use case. What are you trying to accomplish?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see — a new CLI command, an MCP tool, an enhancement to an existing one?

For new commands, sketch the syntax:
```bash
tb new-command <arg> [--option value]
```

For new MCP tools, describe the inputs/outputs.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Component

- [ ] CLI (`tb` command)
- [ ] MCP server (Claude Desktop integration)
- [ ] Extension (`messenger.*` API access)
- [ ] Bridge (proxy logic)
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional context

Anything else — links to Thunderbird API docs, related issues, examples from other tools.
